title: Boss Items
description: A Mod That Adds New Drops For Each Boss Mob (Ender Dragon, Elder Guardian, Wither, Warden)
body:
A Mod That Adds New Drops For Each Boss Mob (Ender Dragon, Elder Guardian, Wither, Warden) If Players Get All Items They Can Make A Heroium Ingot With A Iron Ingot To Upgrade Netherite Into The Powerful Heroium Armor.

The Items Can Also Just Be Used As Trophies For Defeating Tough Vanilla Mobs You That Normaly Would Get Nothing From.

And To Anyone Asking "Can I Use This Mod In My Modpack?" Yes. Just Please (If You Can) Post It On Curseforge Or Link It In The Curseforge Comments. =3
